# Enamorado Insurance Company

> Independent Medicare insurance agency in Lake Worth, Florida. Dalkys Enamorado helps seniors 65+, people new to Medicare, and dual-eligible beneficiaries compare Medicare Advantage, Medicare Supplement, Part D, and Medicaid options — in English and Spanish. No pressure, year-round support.

## Contact

- Phone: (561) 215-1061
- Email: hello@enamoradoinsurancecompany.com
- Address: 3554 Lake Worth Rd, Lake Worth, FL 33461
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM; Saturday by appointment
- Service area: Palm Beach County and surrounding South Florida communities

## Key pages (English)

- [Home](https://enamoradoinsurancecompany.com/en): Medicare guidance, services overview, how we help
- [Services](https://enamoradoinsurancecompany.com/en/services): Medicare Advantage, Medigap, Part D, Medicaid, new to Medicare, renewals
- [About](https://enamoradoinsurancecompany.com/en/about): Dalkys Enamorado, independent broker, agency values
- [Contact](https://enamoradoinsurancecompany.com/en/contact): Request a callback, phone, email, office location

## Páginas clave (Español)

- [Inicio](https://enamoradoinsurancecompany.com/es): Orientación sobre Medicare en español
- [Servicios](https://enamoradoinsurancecompany.com/es/services): Medicare Advantage, Suplemento, Parte D, Medicaid
- [Nosotros](https://enamoradoinsurancecompany.com/es/about): Dalkys Enamorado, corredora independiente
- [Contacto](https://enamoradoinsurancecompany.com/es/contact): Solicitar llamada, teléfono, correo, oficina

## Important notice

We do not offer every plan available in your area. Information is limited to plans we offer. For all options, contact Medicare.gov, 1-800-MEDICARE, or your local SHIP.
